assessment.reason: Migrations 001-009 are all applied both locally and remotely. Migration 010 adds two new tables (nfl_teams, team_game_stats) and seeds 32 team rows. It is additive-only: no columns dropped, no existing tables modified, no data deleted. The unique index on (game_id, team_id) and the self-reference check (team_id <> opponent_id) are idempotent via IF NOT EXISTS guards.
risks: nfl_teams seed INSERT uses ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING — safe to re-run
All constraints and triggers use existence checks before CREATE — idempotent
Foreign key team_game_stats.team_id references nfl_teams.id — seed must complete before pipeline runs
